response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and some embedded systems exposure, they lack critical required qualifications: native Japanese proficiency is a hard requirement and completely absent from their profile, deep C/UNIX expertise for embedded systems is not evident (background is primarily web/full-stack), and there is no demonstrated security specialization in cryptography, network protocols, or threat detection. The role requires embedded networking domain expertise; this candidate's strength is web and full-stack development.
strengths: 15+ years of professional software development experience with proven ability to learn multiple languages and domains
Demonstrated embedded systems and hardware control exposure (robotic arms, mobile device orchestration at Altom; dev-ops infrastructure management)
Strong emphasis on code quality, testing practices, and collaborative development (TDD, CI/CD, code mentoring, refactoring workshops)
concerns: No evidence of native Japanese language proficiency (explicitly required); only English (fluent), Romanian (fluent), and basic German listed
Primary career trajectory is web and full-stack development; no demonstrated embedded networking, LAN switch domain expertise, or security specialization
Limited evidence of deep C/UNIX proficiency for embedded systems; background predominantly TypeScript, Node.js, DLang with only brief C++ experience at National Instruments
